claims.claim: The provided sources consist entirely of business listings for Allstate insurance agents in Miami, Florida, and Microsoft customer support pages
claims.reasoning: All three agents independently reported this claim and it is traceable to the provided sources which are indeed Allstate listings in Miami, FL and Microsoft support pages

claims.claim: None of the sources contain any information about Nigerian domestic politics, governance, economy, trade, labor, society, culture, arts, sports, or entertainment
claims.reasoning: All three agents independently reported this claim and examination of the sources confirms they contain no Nigeria-related content

claims.claim: The sources do not provide any verifiable claims about Nigeria that could be cited in an international affairs report
claims.reasoning: All three agents independently reported variations of this claim and it can be verified by examining the sources

claims.claim: It would be impossible to write a factual, citation-based analysis of Nigeria without relevant source material
claims.reasoning: All three agents independently made this analytical conclusion based on the lack of Nigeria-related content in the sources

claims.claim: The sources contain Allstate insurance agent listings specifically in Miami, Florida
